title: Tiruppur Knitwear Exports Set to Double After India-US Trade Deal
summary: The Tiruppur Exporters’ Association projects exports may double in the next 3-5 years following tariff reductions, potentially adding five lakh new jobs in the cluster.

title: Four-Way Contest Heats Up in Tiruppur North as TVK Joins Fray
summary: Political analysts now see a genuine four-cornered contest in Tiruppur North between DMK, AIADMK, BJP-led NDA and Vijay’s TVK, with the migrant-worker vote emerging as the swing block.

title: Knitwear Cluster Shifts to Recycled Fabrics for EU ‘Green Deal’ Compliance
summary: Over 220 Tiruppur garment units have transitioned to recycled-yarn lines to meet European Green Deal standards, with several signing dyeing-water zero-discharge contracts.

title: Noyyal Riverfront Smart-Energy Phase-1 Inaugurated
summary: The Noyyal Riverfront Development Project’s first phase, integrating solar walkways and water-quality sensors, was inaugurated near Mangalam Road.

title: BJP’s M. Yuvaraja Appeals for ‘Lotus Sweep’ in Erode-Tiruppur Belt
summary: NDA candidate M. Yuvaraja addressed a packed meeting at Avinashi, urging Kongu voters to give the lotus a clean sweep across the western belt.

title: ₹1.4 Crore Cash Seized from Campaign Vehicle Near Palladam
summary: Flying squads in Palladam intercepted a campaign convoy and seized ₹1.4 crore in cash, suspected to be poll inducement money. Three persons detained.

title: Migrant-Worker Voter Awareness Drive Covers 38 Garment Units
summary: The district SVEEP team conducted Tamil-Hindi-Odia awareness sessions across 38 large garment factories to ensure inter-state workers exercise their franchise.

title: Kamal Haasan Begins Campaign Tour for DMK Alliance in Tiruppur
summary: Kamal Haasan begins his four-day campaign tour today supporting DMK-led alliance candidates in Tiruppur and Avinashi constituencies. He will campaign in Avinashi on April 19.

title: DMK's Dinesh Kumar Highlights Textile Hub Development
summary: DMK candidate N. Dinesh Kumar campaigns in Tiruppur South highlighting development projects for the textile hub including new infrastructure.

title: BJP Releases 12-Point Manifesto for Tiruppur South
summary: BJP candidate S. Thangaraj released a constituency-specific manifesto with 12 points for Tiruppur South focused on textile industry growth.

title: TVK's Vijay Roadshow Creates Buzz in Perumanallur
summary: TVK chief Vijay's roadshow in Perumanallur created massive buzz among youth voters in Tiruppur district.

title: Voter Awareness Boat Rally in Tiruppur Water Bodies
summary: A unique voter awareness boat rally was conducted in Tiruppur water bodies urging citizens for 100% turnout on polling day.

title: AIADMK's Anandan Promises ₹10,000 Scholarship
summary: AIADMK candidate S.S.M. Anandan promises ₹10,000 scholarship in Tiruppur North if the party forms the next government.

title: Cash Seized in Textile Areas of Tiruppur South
summary: Flying squads seized cash during checks in the textile areas of Tiruppur South under model code enforcement.

title: Booth Slip Distribution Gains Momentum in All 8 Segments
summary: Door-to-door booth slip distribution gains momentum across all eight assembly segments in Tiruppur district.

title: Bharata Natyam Used for Voter Awareness in Temples
summary: Bharata Natyam performances are being used for innovative voter awareness in Tiruppur temples to engage devotees.

title: Avinashi (SC): Multi-Cornered Contest Heats Up
summary: Avinashi reserved constituency sees multi-cornered contest with DMK, AIADMK, BJP, TVK and NTK candidates running active grassroots outreach.

title: Second Randomization of EVMs Completed
summary: Second randomization of EVMs and polling personnel has been completed across all eight Tiruppur constituencies.

title: Paramilitary Deployed in Sensitive Booths
summary: Paramilitary forces have been deployed for security in sensitive polling booths across Tiruppur district.

title: Vote-a-Than 2026 Marathon with Rotary Clubs
summary: A creative 'Vote-a-Than 2026' marathon was organised with Rotary clubs to spread voter awareness across Tiruppur.

title: Home Voting for 85+ and PWD Voters Rolled Out
summary: Home voting facility has been rolled out for 85+ senior citizens and persons with disabilities across Tiruppur.

title: EVM Commissioning Underway in Tiruppur Constituencies
summary: Election officials in Tiruppur have begun the commissioning of EVMs and VVPATs in the presence of candidate agents and observers ahead of the polling day.

title: DMK Intensifies Final-Phase Outreach in Tiruppur
summary: DMK candidates and alliance workers have intensified door-to-door outreach across Tiruppur, focusing on welfare scheme beneficiaries and first-time voters.

title: SVEEP Street Plays Boost Voter Awareness in Tiruppur
summary: SVEEP teams in Tiruppur performed street plays at bus stands and markets to encourage 100% voter turnout on April 23.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Vehicle Checks in Tiruppur
summary: Flying squads in Tiruppur have intensified vehicle checks at major entry points and highway intersections to curb illegal cash movement.

title: Tiruppur Reports Smooth Progress on Postal Ballot Distribution
summary: District election officials confirmed that postal ballot distribution to service voters and senior citizens in Tiruppur is progressing as per schedule.

title: AIADMK Holds Booth-Level Worker Meetings in Tiruppur
summary: AIADMK held booth-level worker meetings across Tiruppur to finalize polling-day strategy and voter mobilization plans.

title: Tiruppur Colleges Host Voter Pledge Programs
summary: Colleges across Tiruppur hosted voter pledge programs for first-time voters, accompanied by mock EVM demonstrations.

title: Tiruppur Static Surveillance Teams Report Daily to Observers
summary: Static surveillance teams in Tiruppur are reporting daily to election observers on cash, liquor, and freebie movement.

title: Strong Rooms Sealed in Tiruppur After Final Randomization
summary: EVM strong rooms across Tiruppur have been sealed under multi-tier security following the final randomization of polling personnel.

title: BJP Highlights Central Schemes During Tiruppur Roadshow
summary: BJP candidates conducted a roadshow in Tiruppur highlighting central government welfare schemes and infrastructure investments.

title: Booth Slip Distribution Crosses Halfway Mark in Tiruppur
summary: Door-to-door booth slip distribution in Tiruppur has crossed the halfway mark, with BLOs targeting full coverage by April 18.

title: MCC Violation Notices Issued in Tiruppur Constituencies
summary: Several model code of conduct violation notices have been issued in Tiruppur constituencies for unauthorised hoardings and campaign material.

title: Tiruppur Collector Reviews Polling Station Readiness
summary: The District Collector held a review meeting with returning officers in Tiruppur to assess polling station readiness, water supply, and accessibility ramps.

title: TVK Cadre Steps Up Door-to-Door Drive in Tiruppur
summary: TVK cadre led by local coordinators stepped up the door-to-door campaign across Tiruppur, distributing pamphlets and party manifestos.

title: Tiruppur Administration Installs Awareness Hoardings
summary: The Tiruppur district administration has installed voter awareness hoardings at major junctions, urging citizens to exercise their franchise.

title: Tiruppur Police Beef Up Security at Sensitive Booths
summary: Tiruppur district police have beefed up security at sensitive booths with paramilitary deployment and additional patrol vehicles.

title: Mock Polls Demonstrated to Candidates in Tiruppur
summary: Mock polls were demonstrated to candidate representatives in Tiruppur as part of EVM transparency measures before the April 23 election.

title: Congress Workers Hold Street-Corner Meetings in Tiruppur
summary: Congress alliance workers held street-corner meetings in Tiruppur to highlight the alliance's promises on education and healthcare.

title: Voter Helpline Sees Spike in Calls from Tiruppur
summary: The state voter helpline has seen a spike in calls from Tiruppur, mostly enquiring about polling station details and voter slip status.

title: Liquor Seizure Reported During Tiruppur Checks
summary: A significant liquor seizure was reported during routine election-related checks in Tiruppur, and the contraband has been impounded.

title: Tiruppur Voter List Final Verification Concluded
summary: Booth-level officers in Tiruppur have concluded the final voter list verification, ensuring electoral roll accuracy ahead of polling.

title: NTK Organises Cycle Rally Across Tiruppur Towns
summary: Naam Tamilar Katchi organised a cycle rally across Tiruppur towns to highlight environmental and identity-based issues ahead of polling.

title: Tiruppur Differently-Abled Voters Get Dedicated Assistance
summary: Differently-abled voters in Tiruppur are receiving dedicated transport and assistance arrangements from the district election office.

title: Income Tax Teams Conduct Discreet Surveys in Tiruppur
summary: Income Tax teams have been conducting discreet surveys in Tiruppur to track unaccounted financial flows linked to the election period.

title: Sector Officers Deployed Across Tiruppur Polling Zones
summary: Sector officers have been deployed across Tiruppur polling zones to monitor turnout, address grievances, and report issues in real time.

title: Star Campaigners Schedule Final Rallies in Tiruppur
summary: Major political parties have scheduled final-phase rallies of star campaigners in Tiruppur as the silent period nears.

title: Social Media Influencers Promote Turnout in Tiruppur
summary: Local social media influencers in Tiruppur are running short-form video campaigns urging youth to vote on April 23.

title: Tiruppur Cybercrime Cell Monitors Election Misinformation
summary: The Tiruppur cybercrime cell is actively monitoring social media platforms for election-related misinformation and hate speech.

title: Tiruppur Election Control Room Operates Round the Clock
summary: The election control room in Tiruppur is functioning round the clock to handle voter complaints, MCC violations, and logistical queries.

title: Women Self-Help Groups Address Tiruppur Candidates
summary: Women self-help group federations in Tiruppur addressed candidates seeking concrete commitments on livelihood and credit access.

title: Tiruppur Senior Citizens Avail Home Voting Facility
summary: Senior citizens above 85 in Tiruppur are availing the home voting facility, with polling teams visiting registered residences.

title: Bank Cash Movement Tracked in Tiruppur
summary: Bank cash movement above the threshold in Tiruppur is being tracked and verified by election expenditure observers.

summary: Election officials in Tiruppur have begun the commissioning of EVMs and VVPATs in the presence of candidate agents and observers ahead of the polling day.

summary: Trader associations submitted a joint memorandum to candidates in Tiruppur seeking GST relief and infrastructure support.
